title: SonaCMS, for Developers and Business Owners
content: {"time":1783578078704,"blocks":[{"id":"9IrtE38hI2","type":"header","data":{"text":"SonaCMS","level":2},"tunes":{"alignment":{"alignment":"left"}}},{"id":"2fw0qVctSy","type":"paragraph","data":{"text":"A CMS with no database to babysit. Faster pages, better rankings."},"tunes":{"alignment":{"alignment":"left"}}},{"id":"Lgj7oe0pDa","type":"columns","data":{"cols":[{"time":1783578078701,"blocks":[{"id":"PN2KvKiwii","type":"header","data":{"text":"For Developers","level":2},"tunes":{"alignment":{"alignment":"left"}}},{"id":"7wFxYd_ee7","type":"paragraph","data":{"text":"Pages and posts are stored as plain JSON files, not rows in a database you have to back up, migrate, and secure. Install it, point PHP at it, and you're done."},"tunes":{"alignment":{"alignment":"left"}}},{"id":"JOulRTKnmL","type":"header","data":{"text":"Features","level":3},"tunes":{"alignment":{"alignment":"left"}}},{"id":"A4H4yUcRHq","type":"list","data":{"style":"unordered","meta":{},"items":[{"content":"Storage — Content is just files. Every page lives at assets/content/pages/*.json. Read it, diff it, back it up with plain cp if you want to. ","meta":{},"items":[]},{"content":"Performance — No query overhead. No ORM, no connection pool, no N+1 queries. Pages render straight from the filesystem. ","meta":{},"items":[]},{"content":"Ownership — Self-hosted by default. Upload it to any host that runs PHP. No managed database service, no vendor lock-in.","meta":{},"items":[]}]}}],"version":"2.31.6"},{"time":1783578078703,"blocks":[{"id":"FAivxaO2jY","type":"header","data":{"text":"For Business","level":2},"tunes":{"alignment":{"alignment":"left"}}},{"id":"sMK_6JqUtU","type":"paragraph","data":{"text":"SonaCMS builds pages that load quickly and are structured the way search engines like — without plugins to manage or software updates to worry about."},"tunes":{"alignment":{"alignment":"left"}}},{"id":"pDCBX768R_","type":"header","data":{"text":"Features","level":3},"tunes":{"alignment":{"alignment":"left"}}},{"id":"QVVHcVMt5S","type":"list","data":{"style":"unordered","meta":{},"items":[{"content":"Speed — Pages load fast. Fast-loading pages keep visitors around longer and tend to rank better in search results.","meta":{},"items":[]},{"content":"Simplicity — Nothing to update. No plugin library to keep patched. Fewer moving parts means fewer things that can break. ","meta":{},"items":[]},{"content":"Editing — A simple page & post editor. Write and publish pages and blog posts without touching code.","meta":{},"items":[]}]}}],"version":"2.31.6"}]}}],"version":"2.31.6"}
meta_description: SonaCMS for Developers and Business Owners
